name: angorapay-mesh
description: Market-intelligence agents with AngoraPay Mesh routing, policy, receipts, and reconciliation

scripts.angora:agentic-smoke: tsx -e "import { runAgentMission } from './src/angora/agentic/agent-mission-service.ts'; (async()=>{ const r=await runAgentMission({workspaceId:'smoke',tenantId:'smoke',userId:'smoke-user',userGoal:'Evaluate whether this BTC prediction market is mispriced after breaking news',paymentMode:'demo_fallback'}); console.log(JSON.stringify({mission:r.missionId,module:r.specialistAgent,receipts:r.receipts.length,traces:r.traces.length,checkpoints:r.checkpoints.length},null,2)); })();"
scripts.angora:reconciliation-smoke: tsx -e "import { runAgentMission } from './src/angora/agentic/agent-mission-service.ts'; import { runProductionReconciliation } from './src/angora/reconciliation-service.ts'; (async()=>{ const r=await runAgentMission({workspaceId:'smoke',tenantId:'smoke',userId:'smoke-user',userGoal:'Check whether this BTC prediction market is mispriced after breaking news',paymentMode:'demo_fallback'}); const recon=runProductionReconciliation({missionId:r.missionId}); console.log(JSON.stringify({mission:r.missionId,receipts:r.receipts.length,reconciliationRun:recon.reconciliationRunId,checked:recon.checked,matched:recon.matched,pending:recon.pending,failed:recon.failed},null,2)); })();"
scripts.angora:full-check: npm run angora:typecheck && npm run angora:self-test && npm run angora:sdk:python:check && npm run angora:agentic-smoke && npm run angora:reconciliation-smoke

author: AngoraPay Mesh
